productDisplayName: Nike Men AS Squad FT PO Hoody Graph Grey Sweatshirts
description: CompositionDark grey hoodie sweatshirt with the body and hood made of 80% cotton and 20% polyester and hood lining made of 100% cotton, has a hood with drawstrings, full sleeves with ribbed cuffs that have black and red stripes, pockets on the front waist, and has an embroidered nike swoosh and Athletic Department collection badge appliqued on the left chestFittingComfortWash careMachine wash warm with like coloursDo not dry clean, bleach or allow to lay on itself when wetTumble dry lowRemove immediately Warm ironEnjoy the winter in style with hot street food in the chill air with this hooded sweatshirt from nike. Crafted from a thick cotton-polyester blend fabric and with full sleeves, this sweatshirt is designed to keep you warm. Layer it over jeans and t-shirts.
